mapping.description:
Extracts rows from the *Activity* SQLite table that records Windows 10 Timeline events. Each row represents a user‑initiated action, linking an application to a time span and optional payload data.
- Provides a chronological view of user activity across applications. - Captures start / end timestamps for precise temporal analysis. - Stores raw payload for deeper forensic investigation of the activity context.
mapping.query: select * from Activity order by StartTime

field.description: identifier of the application that generated the activity
unique identifier for the specific activity event
grouping value used to categorize related activities
optional tag associated with the activity
raw payload data (e.g., JSON) containing additional activity details
timestamp when the activity was created or synced in the cloud
timestamp marking the start of the activity
timestamp marking the end of the activity
local client timestamp of the last modification to the activity record
original client timestamp before any subsequent modifications
